creator: goffredo@gmail.com
text:
I cerated /usr/local/etc/ffserver.conf, but when I start ffserver:

root:goffredo[1042] /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ffserver start
Starting ffserver.
/etc/ffserver.conf: No such file or directory
Incorrect config file - exiting.

The /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ffserver says:

required_files=/usr/local/etc/ffserver.conf

How-To-Repeat: Install ffserver, and start it.
